nasb.text: “On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan by their armies, and the leader of the sons of Dan: Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai,

esv.text: “On the north side shall be the standard of the camp of Dan by their companies, the chief of the people of Dan being Ahiezer the son of Ammishaddai,

cnv.text: “在北方，按著隊伍，是但營的旗號；但人的領袖是亞米沙代的兒子亞希以謝。

ccb.text: 北边是但营区及其旗号。但人的首领是亚米沙代的儿子亚希以谢，
